subject: [RFC PATCH v4 18/27] mm/memory: NP_OPS_NUMA_BALANCING - private node NUMA balancing

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the new flag and suggested adding additional checks to ensure correct behavior. Also questioned the need for the folio_managed_allows_numa() helper function.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new flag, NP_OPS_NUMA_BALANCING, which allows private nodes to opt-in for NUMA balancing faults. It also adds a helper function, folio_managed_allows_numa(), to determine if a folio can be scanned and migrated by NUMA. The patch modifies the do_numa_page() function to enforce write-protection on private-node folios with NP_OPS_PROTECT_WRITE that fail or skip migration.
